note: Corrected data_models for 31 sourcetypes that carried the invalid 'Inventory.Inventory' value (no such CIM model/dataset). Remapped to Compute_Inventory datasets per splunk_data_model_objects_fields.csv: All_Inventory (general/asset/system inventory), Network (NIC records), User (local user/group and platform accounts), OS (system info), Virtual_OS (VM instances); existing Updates.All_Updates / Authentication.Authentication pairings retained. Five Tenable reference sourcetypes (nessus:plugin, tenable:io:plugin, tenable:sc:plugin, tenable:sc:policy, tenable:sc:repository) cleared to blank -- they are enrichment lookup / scan-config data, not compute events, so they map to no CIM data model. 845 rows.
